products.name: The Encounter // A Dark Realm - Battleground (Oversized)

metadata.rulesText:
Difficulty: Easy
Ursula doesn't draw additional cards for lore each turn.
Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
2 — Ready or exert chosen character.
3 — Chosen player draws 2 cards.

A Dark Realm
Difficulty: Normal

Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Chosen character gets +2 Strength this turn.
2 — Chosen character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn.
3 — Each player except Ursula draws a card.
metadata.artist: Eri Welli / Katie Cuthbertson // Sam Burley / Eri Welli

metadata.rulesText:
Difficulty: Hard
Ursula draws 1 more card each turn.
Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.
2 — Ready chosen character.
3 — Each player except Ursula puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

Infinite Wrath
Difficulty: Extreme
Ursula draws 1 more card card each turn.
Whenever a character of Ursula's is banished, she returns that card to her hand.

Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
2 — Ursula discards a card at random.

metadata.rulesText:
This card was printed with a unique confetti style foiling and was only available as the Secret Victory card in Illumineer's Quest: Deep Trouble.

[An Unexpected Find] [Exert], 2 Ink — Draw a card.
[A Perilous Power] [Exert], 2 Ink, Discard a card — Exert chosen character.
metadata.flavorText: The broken crown holds dark and mysterious powers.

metadata.rulesText:
[Timely Intervention] When you play this character, if you have a character named Magic Broom in play, you may draw a card.
[Arcane Study] While you have 2 or more Broom characters in play, this character gets +2 Lore.

metadata.rulesText:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 Ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Mulan.)
[Straight Shooter] When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her, she gets +3 Strength this turn.
[Triple Shot] During your turn, whenever this character deals damage to another character in a challenge, deal the same amount of damage to up to 2 other chosen characters.

metadata.rulesText:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 Ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Mickey Mouse.)
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
[Sweep Away] When you play this character, deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of Broom characters you have in play.
